opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Nurse reports] He threw up dark brown fluid all over his lunch tray, and his last bowel movement was pure black and sticky. He says he feels like he is going to pass out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Vomiting dark/coffee-ground material and passing black stools, with severe dizziness.

symptom_narrative.character: vomiting coffee-ground material, passing black tarry foul-smelling stools
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat helps the dizziness slightly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: two episodes of coffee-ground vomiting, three large black tarry stools, profound lightheadedness on sitting up, cold extremities
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known severe osteoarthritis on regular high-dose NSAIDs

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: nursing home resident, facility nursing staff present and providing history

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: nursing staff want guidance on whether this needs emergency transfer
